servinfosub.title: Shift Solenoid Valves / Timing Solenoid Valve Inspection

topic.title: Resistance check
topic.ptxt: Check shift solenoid valves and timing solenoid valve.

spec.title: Shift solenoid valves / timing solenoid valve resistance

item.ptxt: Do not insert air blow gun into solenoid valve too deeply and too close to strainer, when blowing air into solenoid valve. Doing so will damage the strainer.
Be very careful not to make dust etc. enter solenoid valves during inspection.
Check that shift solenoid valve (1) operates with click sound when battery voltage is applied to shift solenoid valve body and terminal as shown in figure [A].

When shift solenoid valve (1) is connected to battery (2), confirm that shift solenoid valve is closed by blowing air (50 – 200 kPa, 0.5 – 2.0 kgf/cm2, 7.25 – 29.0 psi) into shift solenoid valve as shown in figure [B].

When shift solenoid valve (1) is not connected to battery (2), confirm that shift solenoid valve is opened by blowing air (50 – 200 kPa, 0.5 – 2.0 kgf/cm2, 7.25 – 29.0 psi) into shift solenoid valve as shown in figure [C].

attention3.ptxt: Do not fail to inspect with air to prevent faulty inspection because return spring for valve is not installed into solenoid valve.

item.ptxt: Do not insert air blow gun into solenoid valve too deeply and too close to strainer, when blowing air into solenoid valve. Doing so will damage the strainer.
Be very careful not to make dust etc. enter solenoid valves during inspection.
Check that timing solenoid valve (1) operates with click sound when battery voltage is applied to timing solenoid valve body and terminal as shown in figure [A].

When timing solenoid valve (1) is connected to battery (2), confirm that timing solenoid valve is opened by blowing air (50 – 200 kPa, 0.5 – 2.0 kgf/cm2, 7.25 – 29.0 psi) into timing solenoid valve as shown in figure [B].

When timing solenoid valve (1) is not connected to battery (2), confirm that timing solenoid valve is closed by blowing air (50 – 200 kPa, 0.5 – 2.0 kgf/cm2, 7.25 – 29.0 psi) into timing solenoid valve as shown in figure [C].

attention3.ptxt: Do not fail to inspect with air to prevent faulty inspection because return spring for valve is not installed into solenoid valve.

servinfosub.title: Pressure Control Solenoid Valve / TCC Pressure Control Solenoid Valve Inspection

attention2.ptxt: Be very careful not to make dust etc. enter pressure control solenoid valves during inspection.

topic.title: Resistance check
topic.ptxt: Measure resistance between pressure control solenoid valves terminals and between TCC pressure control solenoid terminals.

spec.title: Pressure control solenoid valve / TCC pressure control solenoid valve resistance

entry.ptxt: Pressure control solenoid valve / TCC pressure control solenoid valve
